creator: ryu0@ymail.com
text:
Created attachment 159577
revised shell archive

This attachment is an updated shell archive that has the following changes:

1) Patches replaced with the official set incorporated by upstream in git. They still fix the same issues present on FreeBSD 9 and 10.

2) LAME is turned off as a default dependency because it is not available as a binary package.

This should also fix the build issues on FreeBSD 9, as the problem was due to how the patch was originally written by me. I did not test the build on FreeBSD 9 originally, only on FreeBSD 10.
